feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Manufacturing Integration and Intelligence
feed.subtitle: SAP Manufacturing Integration and Intelligence Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Change DB from OEE DB to Hana DB to save all data coming from Erp on MII
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I recently installed a new MII sandbox. Most of the settings are completed. I run the wizards. Basis gave Hana DB setup on the same server for MII tables. But when I created and sent IDocs, I realized the records were saved in the Oee database, not in the Hana DB. I went to the Nwa application resource entered the JraFactory source information of Hana and saved it, but it did not solve. I did the installation according to the Sap Oee CTC guide, there was no Hana DB information there. Most of them entered ERP and NWA information.

I think it will be solved with Wizards. I would be happy for you to express your opinions on this subject.

Best regards,

Emre Yoldas

entry.title: Display custom message on SAP ME(Maufacturing Execution) home screen after login
entry.content:
Hi

If there is server downtime planned then I'm storing the start and end date of downtime in custom table. After login to SAP ME(SAP Manufacturing Execution) home screen, I want to display server downtime alert message on SAP ME homescreen 24 hours prior to planned downtime. Please let me know, if it is possible to display customized messages on home screen in SAP ME?

Thanks in advance.

Tejaswini 🙂

#SAPME

entry.title: SAP MII SSCE SQL query displayed as a number
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have got fixed sql query prepared in SAP MII 15.4.1.43. This query is fetching data for one specyfic day. I have 3 colums. First one is timestamp, second is sfc, third is quantity. I would like to use this simple query is SAP MII SSCE. Idea is to display this query as a single number which would be a sum of quantity column. Is it possible? Or schould I create baseKPI for that?

entry.title: Not able to call getDateValue() from DateTimePicker Class in SAPUI5
entry.content:
I have a View file that uses the DateTimePicker Class.

In controller, I am not able to call the getDateValue() method to get the date time from the view when it is selected. It is showing undefined. 

but in the parent class DatePicker, the getDateValue() method is available. So why can't I directly use this method in the DateTimePicker class since DateTimePicker already extends the DatePicker class. Or do I have to call the super constructor for this in the controller code? (Can you show how). 

(I am getting this error in SAPUI5 v1.60 which comes along with SAP MII v15.3)

entry.title: SAP MII SSCE Can't open configure display parameters window
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a problem with my MDO in SAP MII SSCE. When I drag and drop it to the layout, change visualisation type to grid, I want to add some display parameters. For example:

I open configure display parameters window (it is hard to open at first time, I have to click on icon few times) and choose intrested options (excatlly 24 options), set them and close that window to check if visulisation is ok for me. if not i want to go back to configuration display parameters window, but i can't open it. I just click icon and nothing happend. 

The only option is to delete my MDO from layout and add new one, because this window works only once. There is no problem with odher configuratin windows.   

 

Can you help with that? My sap MII version is 15.4.1.43.

entry.title: Session attribute set to false in SAP PCO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a problem with PCo creating multiple sessions in MII. Every time that PCo sends a notification, a session is created. we have very huge number of session created at SAP MII side whenever there is any notification set from PCO side.

 

My question is.. is this behavior normal in PCo? (creating a session and not closing it every time a notification is sent to MII) or there is any configuration to set the session attribute while calling the MII webservice (WSDL) in PCO. 

we are using SAP PCO 15.5.1.5 version. 

got this link - Pco 2.3 creating multiple sessions in MII - SAP Community but looks like its an old post and not able to see the attribute also.

Quick response is appreciated.

 

Regards,

Ankit Gupta

entry.title: SAP MII SSCE How add fixed filter to grid table
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone tell me how can I set fixed filter for grid tabel in SAP SSCE?

For example I have a table with two columns. I would like to choose only some of the data from set depends of first column. Example:

Table with two columns. First is column with numbers, second is with characters

1 A

2 B

3 C

4 D

 

I want choose only these rows with 2 nad 3 value in column with numbers. Output should look like:

2 B

3 C

 

This should be fixed and people who will use that dashboard can't change it. I use MDO as a data provider for this grid table.

entry.title: Not able to open MII Transaction link in my windows PC, net::ERR_FAILED 200 (OK)
entry.content:
I am trying to read an MII Transaction through web service from my PC and I am getting the cors error. I am using ajax call for this. This I am trying to monitor the Dev server availability. I am passing the login username and password through the IllumLoginName and IllumLoginPassword and the link runs fine, I get this JSON output when I run this link directly in a browser. 

 

Also, I can open the link using window.open() and it opens fine. 

But when using the link in an ajax call, even with crossDomain:true,,, it returns this error. 

Access to XMLHttpRequest at 'https://vchgmesd251.na.int.grp:50001/XMII/Runner?Transaction=DEVTest/Transaction/serverCheckTest&OutputParameter=MessageSend&content-type=text/json&session=false&IllumLoginName=AS4432&IllumLoginPassword=Overhedd22' from origin 'http://127.0.0.1:5501' has been blocked by CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present on the requested resource.

POST https://vchgmesd251.na.int.grp:50001/XMII/Runner?Transaction=DEVTest/Transaction/serverCheckTest&OutputParameter=MessageSend&content-type=text/json&session=false&IllumLoginName=AS4432&IllumLoginPassword=Overhedd22 net::ERR_FAILED 200 (OK)

Is there any way to make it work? or are there any other solutions?

entry.title: SAP MII schedular is in running not in pending
entry.content:
HI experts,

Below are the actions done still the schedular not in pending

1. stop and start schedular(worked for me earlier)

2. terminated running status message in transaction manager

3. disabled and enabled each job (worked for me earlier)

Please let me know how to turn it back to pending state, 

1959006 - scheduler job is stuck in Running status but it does not appear the transaction is executing - SAP for Me

So many are there which I'm unaware.

Regards

Akshey

entry.title: How we can use SAP MII BLS as an API in Custom UI Plugin in SAP Digital manufacturing?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am working on a Custom UI plugin which is having some table columns. 

I want to consume SAP MII BLS transaction as an API in Custom UI plugin in SAP Digital Manufacturing.

is there any possibility to consume imported SAP MII BLS transaction in Digital manufacturing custom plugin?

 

Thanks in Advance 

Regards, 
Utkarsh Raj

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing and SAP MII integration
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,
 
I have few Questions related to SAP Digital Manufacturing and SAP MII integration 
 
Scenario
If any customer has already SAP MII Now they want to move in Digital Manufacturing.
If DM is Connected to MII using Web servers and able to import (in Service registry) BLS Web files in DM.
Customer wants to use the existing BLS/UI of MII in DM.
 
Questions-
1. Can we use SAP MII Existing (BLS and UI) KPI and Reports in DM?
2. We have register some BLS in Service registry in DM can we use that in Embedded SAC? 
3. Data is stored in MII DB and Customer wants to use their old data in DM, how we can access those DB tables?
 
Thanks in Advance !!
 
Regards,
Utkarsh Raj

entry.title: SAP MII Custom table data (MDO) archiving
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

This is with respect to the archiving of custom data tables(MDO's) created in SAP MII.

Scenario - we have custom data table (MDO's) created to store the transactional data in SAP MII. now in production as the data is growing/increasing , users are facing the performance issues while using the SAP MII. also they are not able to perform there day to day activity with SAP MII.

Please note that underlaying database of SAP MII is HANA DB where all the custom tables are getting created.

Requirement - we wanted to check if there is any way in SAP MII or any SAP provided tool to archive the custom data table (MDO's) created to store the transactional data in SAP MII.

any help/ supporting guide/ relevance answer will be appreciated.

Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: MII - ERP IDOC: user type Communication Data
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

We have the application resource XMIIIDOC01 setting with username ME_USER and password on the MII application server.

ME_USER is an ERP user of type "Comunication Data"

Because communication data user type is affected by the password expiretime, it could be a problem.

Which is the best practice to workaround this problem?

Thanks a lot
Mario

entry.title: Sending addional IDOCs to SAP MII
entry.content:
Hi,

it is possible to sent other IDOCS like ORDERS04, CREMASxx or ADRMASxx to SAP MII and create an own workflow for that?

The idea is to sent the cutomer data to SAP MII and then we create a workflow to store this data in SAP ME (Customer Maintenance).

Or we will copy the data from ORDERS04 into a legacy MES.

Best regards,

entry.title: i5Chart with , separated number format value
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using MII 15.1 version i5Charts. Currently it is showing values in BAR charts - y axis as full digit format like 123456.78. But we want to show this value as in thousands - format like 123,456.78. If we are passing this value directly from query, chart is not plotting. 

How to achieve this in i5Chart?

Thanks,

Senthil

entry.title: Connection issue between SAP MII and SAP ECC
entry.content:
Calling FM through SAP MII BLS transaction and getting desired output when executed BLS transaction in MII workbench.

If i called BLS transaction through URL getting "Name or Password incorrect" error.

Checked credentials and connections setting looks good which is used in SAP JCO call.

entry.title: Development especification smartform Label SAP printer Videojet
entry.content:
ello!

I need create development specification for smartform label in SAP. 

We used printer Videojet language ZPL

Does anyone has the specification model to create label in SAP ECC or SAP 4 hana. 

thank you very much

entry.title: SAP DM - Master Data Management
entry.content:
SAP Digital Manufacturingis a promising, rapidly evolving tool for manufacturing companies. It is a solid successor for SAP ME / SAP MII. While SAP DM has many great functions and capabilities that make it a full-fledged MES, I want to now discuss the obstacles users are currently facing with master data migration & synchronization 

Not all master data objects and configurations can be transferred from your ERP system. Instead, this data needs to be currently manually entered directly into SAP DM by the responsible planner or SAP DM keyuser. There are two use cases to consider:

  1. Master data migration is part of every project. When you switch from the test to the productive environment, you need to transfer your data.
  2. Your production is executed at more than one site and you don't want to create the same master data twice in different SAP DM plants. Think about easy and quick master data transport between plants. 

Why is this an issue?

If you don’t have many entries, this doesn’t seem to be a big problem. In fact, developing a solution might even be more expensive than the time your employees or colleagues must spend on the manual process. But try to think long-term or even mid-term: How often do you need to upload, transfer, and synchronize data, and how much time does this cost each time you do it? In addition, the more master data you must enter manually, the higher the probability of errors. Again, the more data you have, the more likely it is that something will go wrong. The last point I would like to address in this context is employee satisfaction. Imagine investing long hours into a repetitive task that can easily be automated.  

It is true that you must consider the frequency of such tasks: Does it only occur once in a while or is it something you have to deal with frequently? How much is a quick upload & synchronization worth? How many errors can you accept in the process? 

Upon addressing the questions above, you can - at the moment - choose one of the following options: 

  1. Continue with the manual process and take the above stated challenges as a given.
  2. Invest resources and create your own solution in-house or with the help of an implementation specialist. 
  3. Use an existing master data management tool for SAP DM. Here you can even opt for a SaaS app that is instantly available and can be easily canceled should you no longer need it. This keeps your investment (both in terms of time and money) transparent. 

What do you think about?

entry.title: How to Consume MII Transaction/ ME PAPI as webservice in Rest based client
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have REST Based client in External system and want to consume MII transaction/ ME Standard PAPI as

webservice there. Do we have any option to achieve this? It would great if some one can answer this. 

I am aware of how to consume MII Transaction/ME PAPI as webservice in SOAP Based Client . But I need to know about REST based client.

 

Thanks,

Bikshapati.

entry.title: SAP OEE Dashboard Error: Customization value and name by work unit could not be found
entry.content:
When attempting to access the OEE Dashboard page, an error message appears stating:

Error 1 :  “Work unit not assigned; contact system administrator”

Error 2 : “Customization value by work unit and customization name could not be found; check log for details”

 

getting error response form api: DataAccessServlet/GetPHNodesForUserInput
